extraction.one_line_summary: GAUDU David threw his bike to steal victory from celebrating VAN AERT Wout in the final meters of the uphill finish at Châtel.
tactical_patterns: B&B Hotels placed four riders in breakaway by sending three chasers after initial move, overwhelming break numerically.
VAN AERT celebrated 1km out on steep uphill finish, lost momentum sitting up, beaten by bike throw.
Total Energies burned domestiques early defending VUILLERMOZ jersey, riders dropped faster than anticipated controlling six-man break.
GEOGHEGAN HART positioned on VAN AERT wheel entering finale, key tactical placement for uphill sprint contenders.

rider_signals.GAUDU David: positive: won with discipline and bike throw while rivals celebrated early, now 6 seconds off yellow
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: negative: premature celebration cost stage win but regained yellow jersey, reveals overconfidence vulnerability on steep uphill finishes
rider_signals.VUILLERMOZ Alexis: negative: lost yellow jersey on final climb despite team burning riders early to defend, insufficient climbing strength
rider_signals.JORGENSON Matteo: positive: moved into white jersey with top-5 finish, Movistar putting American climber in strong GC position
rider_signals.GUERREIRO Ruben: positive: finished fourth and sixth overall, EF showing unexpected climbing depth beyond primary leaders
rider_signals.KONRAD Patrick: positive: top-10 finish indicates Bora climbers performing above expectations early in stage race
rider_signals.CHAVES Esteban: positive: seventh overall suggests resurgent climbing form after career struggles
rider_signals.ROLLAND Pierre: neutral: attacked from break in KOM jersey but used energy early, still holds polka dots
rider_signals.SCHÖNBERGER Sebastian: neutral: B&B Hotels rider initiated breakaway that became four-team move, tactical catalyst
